data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: WhatsApp leverages familiarity by ensuring its interface aligns with users' expectations of messaging apps.
data.technical_spec: Simplified UI with intuitive navigation mirroring conventional messaging apps.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Reduced time complexity by minimizing choices for users through tailored interface design.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined menu options and user-centric design approach.

data.title: Consistency Principle
data.description: Maintains consistent design patterns and messaging formats.
data.technical_spec: Standardized UI elements and consistent interaction models across devices.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizes touch target sizes suitable for mobile usage.
data.technical_spec: Adjustable button sizes and spacing for ease of use on small screens.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: An aesthetically pleasing design enhances user satisfaction and perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes a visually appealing interface with a focus on simplicity and functionality.
